raw_consumer_statement: I made a refundable reservation with a hotel using my citi credit card on XXXX XXXX 2024 for a stay from XXXX XXXX XXXX. I have a booking confirmation that states that the reservation can be canceled 2 days prior to arrival by XXXX. I canceled the reservation on XXXX XXXX XXXX within the cancelation period stated on the confirmation email. I have proof of those booking and cancelation emails that outline the terms of cancelation and that I met the requirements for the cancelation. I emailed the hotel company on XX/XX/XXXX to ask about the status of my refund and after not receiving a response 2 days later, I disputed the charge with the credit card company ( Citi ) on XX/XX/XXXX. When filing the dispute, Citi bank did not allow me to add any attachments to provide proof of the dispute. Citi gave the hotel company two months to response, up to XX/XX/XXXX. I received an email from Citi with an update on my dispute stating that the hotel company states the reservation was non-refundable and that they have reserved a conditional credit and have closed the investigation. This is inconsistent with the booking confirmation emails, cancellation emails and any terms outlined to my at purchase of the reservation. I was not provided with any documents that prove the reservation was non-refundable and the letter from Citi states I have one week to respond. I do not understand how they can give a company 2 months to respond, and I only have one week. I have submitted the documents requested to continue my dispute including the emails from the booking confirmation, cancellation confirmation, etc.
